objects.text: Write is greater than, is less than, is equal to. Also write <,>, or=.
Click on the link to find the solutions:

1. Agnes bought 188 boxes of chocolates and 207 boxes of toys.Did she buy more chocolates or toys?




2.Mrs.Smith  has 340 red stickers, 50 blue stickers, and 18 yellow stickers. Mr. Shan has 372 stickers. 
   Who has more stickers?




3.Use the digits on these cards to make two 3-digit numbers. Use each card only once. Then compare the numbers.
Click here to find the solutions:

We can use place value to compare numbers. Start by looking at the numbers 
in the greatest place value position first. 
If the digits are the same at the highest place value, compare the digits in the 
next place value to the right.
Keep comparing digits with the same place value until you find digits that are different. 
The one with the higher value is the greater number.
